text: The clean, modern lines of this space awaken my analytic mind—glass and steel reflect both literal and metaphorical transparency in inquiry. Stepping closer to the R+D display, I am reminded that every innovation is a product of questions and curiosity. I feel anticipation and openness, as if I’m about to cross a threshold from the known into the labyrinth of possibility. Here, I am part of a dialogue with creation and understanding, inspired to contemplate the interplay of observation, participation, and meaning.
